micro-mind is a Claude Code-style interactive development REPL powered by `qwen25-1.5b-instruct` via `llama-server`. It offers a single capable 1.5 B model for minimum-RAM operation and supports 7 tool surfaces: `read_file`, `list_dir`, `list_files_recursive`, `grep`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, and `bash`. The central design choice is to make the harness smarter instead of pretending the model is smarter, ensuring a single capable model across all workflows.
